projectDescription: An interactive web platform for exploring India's cultural heritage — featuring a D3-powered state map, art forms gallery, historical timeline, 3D Hasta Mudra models, educational games, and a cultural glossary, all grounded in NCERT curriculum.
keyFeatures: Interactive D3-powered map of all Indian states and union territories with regional filtering
Cultural art forms gallery with masonry grid, category filters, and detailed overlays
Interactive historical timeline spanning Prehistoric to Modern India
3D interactive Hasta Mudra (hand gesture) models — 28 single-hand and 22 two-hand gestures
Educational mini-games: State-on-Map, Heritage Site Builder, Guess the Dance Form, Timeline Order, and Culture Trivia Quiz
Cultural glossary with A–Z navigation and alphabetical grouping
Classical dance forms section with Navrasas (expressions) and gesture details
Multi-region map navigation: North, South, East, West, Central, Northeast, Union Territories
publicApiSurface: /explore — Interactive India map with state/region navigation
/explore/:stateId — Deep-link to a specific state's cultural detail panel
/artforms — Cultural gallery: Paintings, Performing Arts, Handicrafts, Monuments, Festivals, Folk Dance
/timeline — Horizontal interactive timeline of Indian history periods and highlights
src/data/states.json — Central data store for all state cultural content
